name: opencode-deus-intus-skillpack
description: Portable OpenCode/OpenClaw-style agents and skills for Deus Intus, design, content, automation, repo auditing, local model setup and AI app prototyping.

install.manual: Copy skills/* into your OpenCode/OpenClaw skills directory.

default_instruction: Read AGENTS.md first. Load only the relevant skill for the current task. Follow SECURITY.md before installing third-party code or running shell commands.
